publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

sourceDesc.p: Work of the literatures of Ethiopia and Eritrea
A TEI file converted from the ETHIO-authority google spreadsheet

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

assertion.unit: Daily Office Prayers and Litanies
Liturgy of Catechumen
Liturgy of Catechumen: Prayer of oblation
Liturgy of Catechumen: Absolution of the son
Liturgy of Catechumen: Prayer by the assistant priest receiving the host during the Prothesis
Liturgy of Catechumen: General absolution
Liturgy of the Word: Supplication for peace, the hierarchy and the assembly
Liturgy of the Word
Liturgy of the Word: Universal prayer by the assistant priest
Liturgy of the Word: Concluding chant after the reading from the Pauline Epistles
Monition from the Liturgy of the Word
Prayers of the Incense
Evening Prayer of the Incense, from Egypt
Morning Prayer of the Incense, from Egypt
Liturgy of the Eucharist
Testament of the Evening
Testament of the Morning
ጸዋትው፡ ዘአበዊነ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ṣawātǝw zaʾabawina ḥawāryāt “Series (of Supplications) of our Fathers the Apostles”
መስተብቍዕ፡ ዘሌሊት፡ mastabqʷǝʿ za-lelit “Supplication of the Night”
Mastabqʷǝʿ za-lelit “Supplication of the Night”
mastabqʷǝʿ baʾǝnta ʾǝlla nomu - part 2
Testament of Midnight
Nicene Creed
Litanies for the days of the week
Additional Anaphoras
Ṣalota kidān za-śalastu gizeyāt “Covenant Prayer of the Three Hours”

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: added prayers/textparts from the Maṣḥāfa nǝfq in ESagm009

relation.name: saws:contains
relation.t:desc: The Ṣalota burāke za-Bāsǝlyos is also part of Maṣḥafa gǝnzat and occurs at least once independently in Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien 71.

t:div.t:label: Morning Prayer of the Incense, from Egypt
Evening Prayer of the Incense, from Egypt
Śǝrʿāta qǝddāse, Chapter 1: Prayer over new vessels
Śǝrʿāta qǝddāse, Chapter 2: Beginning of the Mass, Preparation of the ministers and the altar
Śǝrʿāta qǝddāse, Chapter 3: Liturgy of Catechumen, Liturgy of the Word
Liturgy of Catechumen: Prayer by the assistant priest receiving the host during the Prothesis

t:bibl.title: <hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>

t:div.t:label: Liturgy of Catechumen: Prayer of oblation

t:bibl.title: <hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>

t:div.t:label: Liturgy of Catechumen: Absolution of the son

t:bibl.title: <hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>
<hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>

t:div.t:label: Liturgy of the Word: Concluding chant after the reading from the Pauline Epistles

t:bibl.title: <hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>

t:div.t:label: Monition from the Liturgy of the Word
t:div.t:note: (<hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>[Tasfā Gabra Śǝllāse]ʾAddis ʾAbabāTasfā māttamiyā bet1969Śǝrʿāta qǝddāse, ch. III, §§ 148)

t:div.t:label: Liturgy of the Word: Universal prayer by the assistant priest

t:bibl.title: <hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>

t:div.t:label: Śǝrʿāta qǝddāse, Chapter 4: Liturgy of the Word
Liturgy of the Word: Supplication for peace, the hierarchy and the assembly

t:bibl.title: <hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>

t:div.t:label: Ṣalota kidān za-śalastu gizeyāt “Covenant Prayer of the Three Hours”
Anaphora by John, son of Thunder
Anaphora of Mary by St Cyriacus of Behnesa
Anaphora by Basil
t:div.t:note: Prayer of blessing of St Basil, see <hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>[Tasfā Gabra Śǝllāse]ʾAddis ʾAbabāTasfā māttamiyā bet1969Qǝddase za-ḥawāryāt, §§ 10-21

t:div.t:label: Anaphora Our Lady Mary by Giyorgis
Anaphora of James, the Brother of the Lord
Anaphora Our Lady Mary by Gregory
Anaphora Our Lady Mary by Gregory or Nathanael
Litany for morning and evening, and litany for the Saturday of the Victory
Prayer before the congregation receives the Eucharist
t:div.t:note: from the Liturgy of the Eucharist, Anaphora of the Apostles (<hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>[Tasfā Gabra Śǝllāse]ʾAddis ʾAbabāTasfā māttamiyā bet1969Qǝddase za-ḥawāryāt, §§ 110-112)

t:div.t:label: Prayer of intercession following the imposition of the celebrant‘s hand
t:div.t:note: from the Liturgy of the Eucharist, Anaphora of the Apostles (<hi rend="italics">መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ። በግዕዝና፡ በአማርኛ። (</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse. Bagǝʿǝzǝnnā baʾamārǝññā<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal. In Gǝʿǝz and Amharic’)</hi>[Tasfā Gabra Śǝllāse]ʾAddis ʾAbabāTasfā māttamiyā bet1969Qǝddase za-ḥawāryāt, §§ 154-158)

t:div.t:label: Supplications
t:div.t:note: For the text of the supplications, see Mastabqʷǝʿān.

t:div.t:ab: መስተብቍዐን፡ ዘይበቍዑ፡ ለጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ኵሉ፡ ግብር፡

t:div.t:label: ጸዋትው፡ ዘአበዊነ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ṣawātǝw zaʾabawina ḥawāryāt “Series (of Supplications) of our Fathers the Apostles”

t:bibl.title: መጽሓፈ፡ ጸሎተ፡ ኪዳን። ሊጦን፡ ዘነግህ፡ መስተብቍዕ፡ ወዘይነግስ፡ (maṣḥāfa ṣalota kidān. liṭon za-nagh, mastabqʷǝʿ, wazayǝnaggǝs)

t:div.t:label: መስተብቍዕ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡ (mastabqʷǝʿ baʾǝnta ʾǝlla nomu) - part 1
ወካዕባ፡ ናስተብቍዕ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡ አኀዊነ፡ ከመ፡ ነፍሶሙ፡ የግዕዝ፡ ውስተ፡ መካን፡ ሥዑር፡ ኀባ፡ ማየ፡ ዕረፍት፡ (wakāʿǝbā nāstabǝqqʷǝʿ baʾǝnta ʾǝlla nomu ʾaḫawina kama nafsomu yagʿǝz wǝsta makān śǝʿur ḫabā māya ʿǝraft)

t:bibl.title: መጽሓፈ፡ ጸሎተ፡ ኪዳን። ሊጦን፡ ዘነግህ፡ መስተብቍዕ፡ ወዘይነግስ፡ (maṣḥāfa ṣalota kidān. liṭon za-nagh, mastabqʷǝʿ, wazayǝnaggǝs)

t:div.t:label: እግዚአ፡ ሕይወተ፡ ሙታን፡ ተስፋ፡ ቅቡፃን፡ ረዳኤ፡ ምንዱባን፡ (ʾǝgziʾa ḥǝywata mutān tasfā qǝbuḍān radāʾe mǝndubān)

t:bibl.title: መጽሓፈ፡ ጸሎተ፡ ኪዳን። ሊጦን፡ ዘነግህ፡ መስተብቍዕ፡ ወዘይነግስ፡ (maṣḥāfa ṣalota kidān. liṭon za-nagh, mastabqʷǝʿ, wazayǝnaggǝs)

t:div.t:label: እግዚአብሔር፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ አምላክነ፡ ዘትቤሎ፡ ለፍቁርከ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ (ʾǝgziʾabǝḥer ʾǝgziʾabǝḥer ʾiyasus krǝstos ʾamlākǝna za-tǝbelo la-fǝqurǝka yoḥannǝs)

t:bibl.title: መጽሓፈ፡ ጸሎተ፡ ኪዳን። ሊጦን፡ ዘነግህ፡ መስተብቍዕ፡ ወዘይነግስ፡ (maṣḥāfa ṣalota kidān. liṭon za-nagh, mastabqʷǝʿ, wazayǝnaggǝs)

t:div.t:label: ወካዕባ፡ ናስተብቍዕ፡ ለግዝእትነ፡ ኵልነ፡ ርያም፡ ምነ፡ ወሙ፡ ለግዚእነ፡ (wakāʿǝbā nāstabǝqqʷǝʿ la-ǝgzǝʾtǝna kʷǝllǝna Māryām ǝmmǝna wa-ǝmu la-ǝgziʾǝna)
Supplication to the Cross
t:div.t:ab: ወካዕባ፡ ናስተብቍዕ፡ ለዕፀ፡ ቅዱስ፡ መስቀል፡ ጽኑዓ፡ ሥልታን፡ ወኃይል፡፡ (wakāʿǝbā nāstabǝqqʷǝʿ la-ʿǝḍa qǝddus masqal ṣǝnuʿā śǝltān wa-ḫāyl)

t:div.t:label: መስተብቍዕ፡ ዘሌሊት፡ mastabqʷǝʿ za-lelit “Supplication of the Night”

t:div.t:ab: ናስተብቍዕ፡ ዘኵሎ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ ግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚ፡ ወ፡ መድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡፡ እስማ፡ ረሰየነ፡ ተድለ፡ (Nāstabǝqqʷǝʿ za-kʷǝllo yǝʾǝḫḫǝz ǝgziʾabǝḥer ʾab la-ʾǝgzi wa madḫanina ʾIyasus Krǝstos. ʾƎsmā rasayanna tadla)

t:div.t:label: Litanies
t:div.t:note: The following textparts follow the modern printed edition መጽሐፈ፡ ቅዳሴ፡ <hi rend="italics">(</hi>Maṣḥafa qǝddāse<hi rend="italics">, ‘Book of the Missal')</hi>Anon.ʾAśmarāba-māḫbara ḥawāryāt fǝre hāymānot ba-kokaba ṣǝbāḥ māttamiyā bet tāttama1957bm:1957Qeddasebm:1957Qeddase184-188. The assignment of the litanies to the days of the week varies accross manuscripts.

t:div.t:label: Litanies for the days of the week
Litany for Wednesday
t:div.t:note: This litany is also attested for Friday or Saturday.

t:div.t:label: Litany for Thursday
t:div.t:note: This litany is also attested for Friday or Saturday.

t:div.t:label: Litany for Friday
t:div.t:note: This litany is also attested for Sunday.

t:div.t:label: Litany for Saturday
t:div.t:note: This litany is also attested for Thursday.

t:div.t:label: Litany for Sunday
t:div.t:note: This litany is also attested for Wednesday.
